summary: Comprehensive testing of Packaging Types master page feature. All 13 test cases passed - backend CRUD APIs (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE), duplicate name validation, frontend page with table/create/edit/delete, SKU Management packaging type dropdown, Production Batch creation packaging type dropdown, and sidebar navigation.
seed_data_creation: 4 packaging types seeded: Crate - 24 (24 units), Crate - 12 (12 units), Carton - 6 (6 units), Carton - 48 (48 units)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Packaging Types feature fully implemented and tested. Key data-testid values: packaging-types-page, packaging-types-table, create-packaging-type-btn, packaging-row-{id}, edit-packaging-{id}, delete-packaging-{id}, packaging-name-input, packaging-units-input, packaging-desc-input, packaging-save-btn. SKU Management has sku-packaging-select dropdown. Production Batch creation has batch-bpc-input select dropdown for packaging types.

backend_api.GET /api/packaging-types: PASSED - Returns list with 4 seeded types
backend_api.POST /api/packaging-types: PASSED - Creates new type with name, units_per_package, description

frontend_packaging_types_page.table_displays: PASSED - Shows Name, Units/Package, Description, Actions columns
frontend_packaging_types_page.seeded_data: PASSED - 4 rows displayed (Carton-48, Carton-6, Crate-12, Crate-24)
frontend_packaging_types_page.create_dialog: PASSED - Opens with Name, Units per Package, Description fields
frontend_packaging_types_page.edit_dialog: PASSED - Opens with pre-filled values, Update button

frontend_sku_management.dropdown_options: PASSED - Shows None + 4 packaging types with units

frontend_production_batch.packaging_type_dropdown: PASSED - data-testid=batch-bpc-input is a select element
frontend_production_batch.dropdown_options: PASSED - Shows Select packaging + 4 packaging types
frontend_production_batch.replaces_text_input: PASSED - No longer a number input, now a dropdown

sidebar_navigation.production_module: PASSED - Packaging Types nav item found under Product & SKU section
